sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشُّعَرَاءُ قَدِيمًا يَجْتَمِعُونَ فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnici su se nekada okupljali na pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: In the past, poets used to gather in the market.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبُوا قَصَائِدَ طَوِيلَةً عَنِ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَالْخَيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Pisali su duge pjesme o pustinji i konjima.
sentences.translationEn: They wrote long poems about the desert and horses.

sentences.translation: Riječi su bile veoma snažne i dirljive.
sentences.translationEn: The words were very powerful and moving.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ، نَحْنُ نَقْرَأُ هَذِهِ الْأَشْعَارَ فِي الْمَدَارِسِ.
sentences.translation: Sada ove pjesme čitamo u školama.
sentences.translationEn: Now, we read these poems in schools.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ سَمَاعَ الْقَوَافِي الْجَمِيلَةِ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi svuda vole slušati lijepe rime.
sentences.translationEn: People everywhere love hearing beautiful rhymes.
